The Author
Rev Mokoro Manana
Rev Mokoro Manana
Apostle · Author · Kingdom Entrepreneur
FOURNITY is an ILLUMINATION God gave to Rev Mokoro Manana — Pastor, Apostle, Author and Founder of Zero2Billionaires Amavulandlela Pty Ltd — after thirty-five years of prayer, study and walking with the Holy Spirit.
FOURNITY is an Illumination of the revelation of the Unity of Trinity and Humanity before Genesis chapter 1 verse 1, the loss of that unity in Genesis Chapter 3, and the restoration of that unity in Acts Chapter 2.
The word does not exist in any dictionary. It was not coined by a scholar or a religious council. It was given as an Illumination — a single word that carries the weight of the most staggering truth ever written about the human being and their relationship with the God who breathed them into existence.
"Before Genesis chapter one was — you were."
Based in Gauteng, South Africa. Married to Prophetess Ntswaki Manana — The Hephzibah. Anchor scripture: Genesis 1:28.
— Rev Mokoro Manana

Requirements To Unlock Chapters

Record a short video review — 2 to 9 minutes. It must open with this exact line:

"I am reading the book FOURNITY: Celebrating our Union with God in Christ Jesus — Father. Son. Holy Spirit. And the Adopted: You."

After that, share it in your own words. Then pin your affiliate link as the first comment on your post — this is how sales get credited to you and how you get paid.

Submit just one screenshot of your posted video — that's all that's needed.

Every confirmed review unlocks your next chapter, and you earn 20% on every sale through your link. Reach 10 confirmed sales, and you're offered Book Distributor Rights across every Zero2Billionaires digital publication, present and future.
